title: Tala Silicone Jar and Pot Cover, Seals and Protects Cans and Small Containers to keep your items fresher for linger, Reusable and made from BPA-Free Silicone (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
PRESERVE: Ideal for jars, cans, and containers, providing a secure, airtight seal which stores your food and drinks
FLEXIBLE AND REUSABLE: Made from durable silicone that stretches to fit different can and jar sizes and is built for long-lasting use
BPA-FREE: Safe, food-grade silicone free from harmful chemicals, ensuring your food stays safe and fresh
ECO-FRIENDLY: A sustainable alternative to single-use plastic wraps and tin foil, helping reduce waste in your kitchen
DISHWASHER SAFE: Easy to clean and maintain – simply toss it in the dishwasher for hassle-free cleaning
